mapper.sql: id, task_id, attempt_no, request_id, fence_token, worker_id, provider, model, status, lease_expire_time, branch_name, base_sha, head_sha, tree_sha, diff_sha, pr_url, pr_number, policy_passed, validation_passed, validation_summary, error_code, error_message, started_at, finished_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select coalesce(max(attempt_no), 0) + 1 from ai_attempt where task_id = #{taskId}
select count(*) from ai_attempt a join ai_task t on t.id = a.task_id where t.project_id = #{projectId} and a.status in ('claimed','running')
mapper.insert: insert into ai_attempt (task_id, attempt_no, request_id, fence_token, worker_id, provider, model, status, lease_expire_time, branch_name, base_sha, create_time, update_time) values (#{taskId}, #{attemptNo}, #{requestId}, #{fenceToken}, #{workerId}, #{provider}, #{model}, #{status}, #{leaseExpireTime}, #{branchName}, #{baseSha}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select id, task_id as taskId, attempt_no as attemptNo, worker_id as workerId, provider, model, status, lease_expire_time as leaseExpireTime, branch_name as branchName, base_sha as baseSha, head_sha as headSha, diff_sha as diffSha, pr_url as prUrl, pr_number as prNumber, policy_passed as policyPassed, validation_passed as validationPassed, validation_summary as validationSummary, error_code as errorCode, error_message as errorMessage, started_at as startedAt, finished_at as finishedAt, create_time as createTime from ai_attempt where task_id = #{taskId} order by attempt_no desc
mapper.update: update ai_attempt set status = 'running', lease_expire_time = #{leaseExpireTime}, started_at = coalesce(started_at, now()), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and fence_token = #{fenceToken} and worker_id = #{workerId} and status in ('claimed','running') and lease_expire_time >= now() and exists (select 1 from ai_task t where t.current_attempt_id = ai_attempt.id and t.status in ('claimed','running'))

update ai_attempt set status = 'succeeded', head_sha = #{headSha}, tree_sha = #{treeSha}, diff_sha = #{diffSha}, pr_url = #{prUrl}, pr_number = #{prNumber}, policy_passed = 1, validation_passed = 1, validation_summary = #{validationSummary}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and fence_token = #{fenceToken} and worker_id = #{workerId} and status in ('claimed','running') and lease_expire_time >= now() and exists (select 1 from ai_task t where t.current_attempt_id = ai_attempt.id and t.status in ('claimed','running'))

update ai_attempt set status = 'failed', policy_passed = #{policyPassed}, validation_passed = #{validationPassed}, validation_summary = #{validationSummary}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and fence_token = #{fenceToken} and worker_id = #{workerId} and status in ('claimed','running') and lease_expire_time >= now() and exists (select 1 from ai_task t where t.current_attempt_id = ai_attempt.id and t.status in ('claimed','running'))
mapper.insert: insert ignore into ai_attempt_log (attempt_id, seq, level, message, create_time) values (#{attemptId}, #{seq}, #{level}, #{message}, #{createTime})
